queries.question: Show all the news articles and, in addition, only the featured articles that are 2000 words long.
queries.sql:
SELECT Articles.title 
FROM Articles
WHERE Articles.Written_Journalism = "News Article" OR Articles.Written_Journalism = "Feature Article" AND Articles.Word_Count = "2000 words"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?articles a :Articles .
  ?articles p:Title ?title .
  ?articles p:Written_Journalism ?written_journalism_w .
  ?articles p:Written_Journalism ?written_journalism_w2 .
  ?articles p:Word_Count ?word_count_w .
  FILTER((STR(?written_journalism_w) = "News Article" || (STR(?written_journalism_w2) = "Feature Article" && STR(?word_count_w) = "2000 words")))
}

queries.question: Give me all news articles and featured articles that are 2000 words long.
queries.sql:
SELECT Articles.title 
FROM Articles
WHERE (Articles.Written_Journalism = "News Article" OR Articles.Written_Journalism = "Feature Article") AND Articles.Word_Count = "2000 words"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?articles a :Articles .
  ?articles p:Title ?title .
  ?articles p:Written_Journalism ?written_journalism_w .
  ?articles p:Written_Journalism ?written_journalism_w2 .
  ?articles p:Word_Count ?word_count_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?written_journalism_w) = "News Article" || STR(?written_journalism_w2) = "Feature Article")) && STR(?word_count_w) = "2000 words"))
}
